llm_response:
# Resignation Letter

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I have decided to **resign** from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day will be [Date]. I want to ensure that this decision is communicated clearly and respectfully, as I value the time we have spent working together.

# Reasons for Decision

After careful consideration, I have determined that it is the right time for me to move forward with my career. Specifically, I am seeking new opportunities that offer greater alignment with my long-term professional goals and a different scope of challenges. Additionally, some personal circumstances have arisen that require my full attention and presence elsewhere. While I have cherished my time here, I believe it is necessary for me to **resign** at this moment to pursue these new paths.

# Transition and Gratitude

I am deeply grateful for the support and mentorship you have provided throughout my tenure. Thank you for the opportunity to grow within this organization and for the trust you have placed in me. I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition and will do everything possible to **resign** in a way that minimizes disruption to the team.

To facilitate this process, I have outlined a key transition plan below:
*   Completing all current projects and documenting procedures for ongoing tasks.
*   Preparing a comprehensive handover document for my successor.
*   Assisting in training the team members who will take over my responsibilities.

Thank you again for the opportunity to be part of such a dedicated team. I look forward to staying in touch.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
